rulings.Calendar Matter: Notce Of Motion And Motion Of Respondent Brian Mcgonigle To Modify Or Amend Order Appointing Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 31, 2016, line 1. RESPONDENT BRIAN MCGONIGLE Notce Of Motion And Motion Of Respondent Brian Mcgonigle To Modify Or Amend Order Appointing Receiver is DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain its burden under CCP 1008. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 31, 2016, line 2. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden. The Bond shall remain in place. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MASAZUMI INOUE VS. PREFERRED MORTGAGE SERVICES et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 31, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is is continued to September 13, 2016 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SIDNEY UNOBSKEY VS. SIMON MICHAEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Simon Michaels Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Dated July 26, 2016
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 31, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT SIMON MICHAEL Notice Of Motion For Simon Michaels Motion For Reconsideration Of The Courts Order Dated July 26, 2016 is GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden to show existence of new facts and circumstances. Injunction is granted as follows: Sidney Unobskey to produce all surveys and reports related to the settlement of Sidney Unobskey's home to the extent the surveys and reports are used in any future challenges, objections, etc. to Michael's construction. The documents must be produced at least 3 business days before the challenge/objection is made (or as soon as practically possible), but in no event later than on the same day as the challenge/objection. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM DAWSON VS. PETER ISKANDAR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint

Motion And Notice Of Hearing On Motion For Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16 Special Motion To Strike (Anti-Slapp) Complaint is continued to September 29, 2016. Plaintiff served but failed to file his opposition until August 30, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. MARTHE SCHREIBER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 31, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT MARTHE SCHREIBER DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to Plaintiff to attach the written authorization (confidential information such as the amount of compensation, etc. may be redacted) and to identify the name and capacity of Plaintiff's agent whose signature appears on the Lease. = (501/REQ)
